vix_read: moderate — average historical level, no particular stress
vvix_read: elevated — meaningful uncertainty about how much VIX could move
combined_read: No strong signal either way -- both measures are in unremarkable middle ranges.
data_note: Yahoo Finance daily close, not live tick data.

curve.regime_text: No previous reading on file yet — can't classify a flattener/steepener move until there's a second data point to compare against. Will be available from the next update onward.
